response: To cut out sugar from your daily diet, start by reading food labels and avoiding products with [sweetener names]. Replace sugary snacks with fruits or nuts, and use [natural sweeteners] like honey or stevia in moderation. Drink water instead of soda and check hidden sugars in sauces and dressings. Gradually reduce sugar intake to avoid cravings. Keep a food diary to track your progress. Make healthy choices at home and when eating out. Stay consistent and celebrate small victories.
